user_query: find tariff-driven cost increases with dollar amounts

proposed_columns.name: tariff_cost_mentioned
proposed_columns.description: Whether the filing mentions tariff-driven cost increases
proposed_columns.extraction_instruction: Look for mentions of 'tariff', 'customs', 'import duties', or 'trade barriers' in the context of cost increases. Check MD&A and AIF sections.

proposed_columns.name: cost_increase_amount
proposed_columns.description: Dollar amount of tariff-driven cost increase, if specified
proposed_columns.extraction_instruction: Extract any explicit dollar amount (e.g., $5M, CAD 2.5 million) associated with tariff-related cost increases in the text.

proposed_columns.name: currency_type
proposed_columns.description: Currency type of the cost increase amount (e.g., CAD, USD)
proposed_columns.extraction_instruction: Identify the currency type (e.g., CAD, USD) associated with the cost increase amount mentioned in the text.

proposed_columns.name: cost_increase_period
proposed_columns.description: Time period over which the cost increase occurred (e.g., 2024, Q1 2025)
proposed_columns.extraction_instruction: Extract the time period (e.g., '2024', 'Q1 2025') associated with the tariff-driven cost increase.

proposed_columns.name: evidence_quote
proposed_columns.description: Verbatim quote from the filing supporting the extraction
proposed_columns.extraction_instruction: Capture the exact text from the filing that mentions the tariff-driven cost increase and its associated details.

proposed_columns.name: not_found_reason
proposed_columns.description: Reason why the information was not found in the filing
proposed_columns.extraction_instruction: If no relevant information is found, record the reason (e.g., 'no mention of tariffs', 'no dollar amount specified').

user_query: find tariff-driven cost increases with dollar amounts

proposed_columns.name: tariff_mention
proposed_columns.description: Whether the filing explicitly mentions tariffs or trade-related costs.
proposed_columns.extraction_instruction: Look for mentions of 'tariff', 'trade barriers', 'customs duties', or 'import/export costs' in the MD&A or AIF sections of the 2025 filing.

proposed_columns.name: liberation_day_tariff_mention
proposed_columns.description: Whether the filing specifically references the Liberation Day tariffs.
proposed_columns.extraction_instruction: Search for 'Liberation Day tariffs', 'Libya tariffs', or '2023 Libya trade measures' in the MD&A or AIF sections of the 2025 filing.

proposed_columns.name: cost_increase_amount
proposed_columns.description: Dollar amount of tariff-driven cost increase, if explicitly stated.
proposed_columns.extraction_instruction: Identify any verbatim mention of a specific dollar amount related to increased costs due to tariffs, such as 'increased by $X million' or 'tariff costs reached $X'.

proposed_columns.name: cost_increase_period
proposed_columns.description: Timeframe of the tariff-driven cost increase, if explicitly stated.
proposed_columns.extraction_instruction: Look for explicit timeframes such as 'Q1 2024', '2023-2024', or 'since the imposition of the Liberation Day tariffs' in the MD&A or AIF sections.

proposed_columns.name: evidence_quote
proposed_columns.description: Verbatim quote from the filing that supports the extraction.
proposed_columns.extraction_instruction: Capture the exact text from the filing that confirms the presence of tariff-related costs, their amounts, or timeframes.

proposed_columns.name: not_found_reason
proposed_columns.description: Reason why the information was not found in the filing.
proposed_columns.extraction_instruction: If no mention of tariffs, cost increases, or related terms is found, record the reason, e.g., 'no mention of tariffs in MD&A', 'no financial impact stated', or 'information not available'.
